content: @upstash/ratelimit 2.0.8 (latest) with @upstash/redis 1.38.0 (latest). Connectionless HTTP-based rate limiting for serverless. Three algorithms: slidingWindow(count, window), fixedWindow(count, window), tokenBucket. Redis.fromEnv() reads UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN. limit(identifier) returns {success, reset (epoch ms), remaining, limit}. Retry-After = Math.ceil((reset - Date.now()) / 1000). Singleton pattern: instantiate Ratelimit at module level, not per-request. For auth brute-force: fixedWindow preferred (cheaper). For API limiting: slidingWindow preferred (prevents boundary bursts). Upstash maintainer-published package, confirmed official (upstash maintainers on npm).
